summary: Deterministic proof that Cautilus Agent guidance in this product repo prefers the checked-in ./bin/cautilus source launcher and that the packaged skill preserves that guidance.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the listed Cautilus Agent skill claim is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every future agent runtime will always obey the guidance.
The installed `cautilus` binary on PATH is actually stale on this machine.
Consumer repos should use `./bin/cautilus`; the skill explicitly keeps consumer repos on `cautilus` from PATH.
The source-launcher preference proves claim-discover or review-input packet behavior.

commandEvidence.reason: Skill disclosure check confirms the source Cautilus Agent and packaged Cautilus Agent stay synchronized while retaining required binary-resolution fragments.
Focused release and repo-shim tests cover packaged skill sync, product distribution surfaces, and the repo source launcher forwarding to the Go CLI entry.

commandEvidence.command: sh -lc 'CAUTILUS_BIN=cautilus; if [ -x ./bin/cautilus ]; then CAUTILUS_BIN=./bin/cautilus; fi; printf "resolved=%s\n" "$CAUTILUS_BIN"; "$CAUTILUS_BIN" --version'

decision.reason: The source and packaged Cautilus Agent skill text match, the skill-disclosure and distribution tests pass, and the local resolution snippet chooses ./bin/cautilus in this product checkout before printing the current source launcher version.
